2025 AIA INTERNATIONAL DESIGN AWARDS




AIA International held its 2025 Design Awards Ceremony at the Cinnamon Grand hotel in Colombo, Sri Lanka on 11 October 2025, as part of the AIA International Conference Sri Lanka: The Art within Architecture. In this 12th year of the awards, we were delighted to once again see a record number of entries.

The 2023 AIA International Design Awards
Submissions now open!

AIA International is the broadest geographical component of the American Institute of Architects. The AIA International Design Awards recognize best practices, innovative thinking, and design excellence of AIA members’ projects worldwide.
